member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Assets.IBlobStorageProvider
member.summary: Represent abstraction for working with binary data

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Assets.IBlobStorageProvider.Move(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Move specified blob with srcUrl to destUrl

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Assets.IBlobStorageProvider.MoveAsyncPublic(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Move specified blob with srcUrl to destUrl

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Assets.IBlobStorageProvider.Copy(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Copy specified blob with srcUrl to destUrl

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Assets.IBlobStorageProvider.CopyAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Copy specified blob with srcUrl to destUrl

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Swagger.UploadFileAttribute.Name
member.summary: Logical name of the file field in the generated OpenAPI schema. Defaults to "uploadedFile". This name is used only for documentation/UI (for example, Swagger UI form field name) and does not affect how the stream is read in the action.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Swagger.UploadFileAttribute.Description
member.summary: Human‑readable description for the file field in the generated OpenAPI document (for example, tooltip in Swagger UI).

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Swagger.UploadFileAttribute.Type
member.summary: OpenAPI schema type for the file property. For file uploads this should remain "string"; the corresponding schema formatter will set format = "binary" to indicate a streamed binary payload. See: https://swagger.io/docs/specification/describing-request-body/file-upload/

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Swagger.UploadFileAttribute.Required
member.summary: Indicates whether the file field is required in the generated OpenAPI schema. Set to true when a file must always be provided in the multipart request body.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.AssetsModule.Core.Swagger.UploadFileAttribute.AllowMultiple
member.summary: When true, describes the file field as a collection of files (for example, an array of string/binary items) in the generated OpenAPI schema, allowing multiple files to be uploaded under the same logical field name.
